title: Forgified Core
description: Created for modpack makers, combines all the features of OptiFine and good performance. Supports (Neo)Forge and Fabric mods at the same time.
body:
## THANK YOU TO EVERYONE WHO USED THIS MODPACK! SEE YOU IN 26.1.X! ## Description: So, here is the ([Neo](https://neoforged.net))[Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net) version of the [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) and [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) hybrid modpack with [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) and [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api) pre-installed. This modpack contains all their key features, namely support for most [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) features, decent performance and allows you to install the ([Neo](https://neoforged.net/))[Forge](https://forums.minecraftforge.net/) and [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) mods at the same time. It also comes with [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) and [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player) pre-installed resourcepacks that animate all living entities, including your character. Great for creating your own modpack based on it. Enjoy!
FAQㅤ
Q: What mods does it have? A: Click any version and scroll down.
Q: Do I need the modpack on the server? A: No, it works on all servers that allow vanilla clients.
Q: One of the Fabric mods crashes the client! A: Join us on [Sinytra Connector Discord](https://discord.com/invite/mamk7z3TKZ) for help.
